tree.name: DeMar DeRozan
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team sign-and-trade: SAC sent Harrison Barnes and a 2031 1st round pick swap to SAS; SAC sent cash, Chris Duarte, a 2025 2nd round pick (SAC own, Rocco Zikarsky), and a 2028 2nd round pick (SAC own) to CHI; CHI sent DeMar DeRozan to SAC. Sacramento also received a trade exception.
tree.note: 6-time All-Star, originally drafted 9th overall by Toronto in 2009

assetsGivenUp.name: Harrison Barnes
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Kings traded Justin Jackson and Zach Randolph to Mavericks for Harrison Barnes
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally drafted 7th overall by Golden State in 2012

assetsGivenUp.name: Justin Jackson
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Kings traded Zach Collins (10th pick) to Trail Blazers for Harry Giles and Justin Jackson (15th pick)
assetsGivenUp.note: Forward drafted 15th overall from North Carolina by Portland, acquired on draft night

assetsGivenUp.name: Zach Collins
assetsGivenUp.note: Center drafted 10th overall from Gonzaga, selected using pick acquired from NOP in Cousins trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Zach Randolph
assetsGivenUp.note: Veteran forward signed as free agent

assetsGivenUp.name: 2031 1st Round Pick Swap (SAS)
assetsGivenUp.note: Unprotected pick swap rights sent to San Antonio Spurs

assetsGivenUp.name: Chris Duarte
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Kings traded a 2028 2nd round pick (DAL own) and a 2030 2nd round pick (SAC own) to Pacers for Chris Duarte
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally drafted 13th overall by Indiana in 2021

assetsGivenUp.name: 2028 2nd Round Pick via DAL
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Kings traded Jaden Hardy (37th pick) to Mavericks for a 2024 2nd round pick (DAL own, Anton Watson) and a 2028 2nd round pick (DAL own)
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from Dallas in Jaden Hardy draft-night trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Jaden Hardy
assetsGivenUp.note: Guard drafted 37th overall, traded on draft night to Dallas

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick via SAC
assetsGivenUp.note: Sacramento's own 2nd round pick, sent to CHI
